pi_items.source: Gretl data file header (gzip-decompressed XML) and web search for Mroz 1987 paper
Direct count of observations where lfp=1 in mroz.gdt dataset
Verified all variables present in second-stage OLS regression on mroz.gdt data
Two-stage OLS regression: first stage (educ ~ exper + expersq + mothereduc), second stage (lwg ~ educ + exper + expersq + v_hat)
Path specified consistently in task.json and setup_task.sh scripts

privileged_info_summary: The Mroz dataset (mroz.gdt) is a real, publicly available dataset from Mroz 1987 containing 753 observations of married women, with 428 observations (lfp=1) representing working women. The expected sample size of 428 is correct. The expected second-stage regression variables (const, educ, exper, expersq, v_hat) are all appropriate. The target coefficient for v_hat is 0.057 with tolerance ±0.015 (range [0.042, 0.072]); the actual two-stage OLS coefficient is 0.0684, which falls within the acceptable range. The dataset contains all necessary variables including wage (from which lwg is derived), education levels, labor force participation indicator, experience, and parental education (mothereduc and fathereduc).
